name: Code Refactoring
description: Systematic code quality improvement while maintaining functionality

steps.description: Analyze current code structure and identify improvement opportunities
steps.exit_criteria: Refactoring scope and approach clearly defined

steps.description: Review code quality issues and prioritize refactoring targets
steps.exit_criteria: Refactoring priorities established with risk assessment

steps.description: Establish baseline tests to ensure no functionality regression
steps.exit_criteria: Comprehensive test suite in place before refactoring

steps.description: Implement refactoring changes incrementally with continuous testing
steps.exit_criteria: Code refactored, all tests passing, functionality preserved

steps.description: Verify refactoring improved code quality without breaking functionality
steps.exit_criteria: Code quality improved and functionality verified

success_criteria: Code quality improved, all tests passing, no functionality regression, documentation updated
